form.title: Align Reads (nf-core/sarek)
form.description: Perform read alignment, mark duplicates, and base recalibration.

workflow_version.title: Workflow Version
workflow_version.description: Version of nf-core/sarek to run (e.g. 3.8.1). See https://nf-co.re/sarek/releases for all releases.

analysis_type.title: Experimental Design
analysis_type.description: Details on the reference genome and optional target panel used to generate sequences.

genome_source.title: Reference Genome Source
genome_source.description: Select whether to use a curated iGenomes reference or a pre-built BWA genome index dataset from Cirro.

igenomes.title: Reference Genome (iGenomes)
igenomes.description: Select a curated reference genome from the iGenomes collection.

bwa_cirro_reference.title: Custom Genome Index (BWA)
bwa_cirro_reference.description: Select a pre-built BWA genome index dataset from Cirro. GATK known-sites resources are not available for custom genomes.

wes.title: Whole Exome/Targeted Gene Panel Assay
wes.description: Please indicate if your data was generated using a capture kit.

intervals.title: Genomic intervals
intervals.description: Target bed file in case of whole exome or targeted sequencing or intervals file for parallelization.

read_trimming_options.title: Read Trimming Options
read_trimming_options.description: Parameters for performing adapter and read trimming using Trim-Galore.

clip_r1.title: Clip R1
clip_r1.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 5' end of read 1 (or single-end reads).

clip_r2.title: Clip R2
clip_r2.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 5' end of read 2 (paired-end reads only).

three_prime_clip_r1.title: Three Prime Clip R1
three_prime_clip_r1.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 3' end of read 1 AFTER adapter/quality trimming has been performed.

three_prime_clip_r2.title: Three Prime Clip R2
three_prime_clip_r2.description: Instructs Trim Galore to remove bp from the 3' end of read 2 AFTER adapter/quality trimming has been performed.

trim_nextseq.title: Trim NextSeq
trim_nextseq.description: DetectS polyG in read tails and trim them. Corresponds to the FastP flag `--trim_poly_g.`

save_trimmed.title: Save the trimmed FastQ files in the results directory?

length_required.title: Minimum read length
length_required.description: Minimum length of reads to keep after trimming (FastP --length_required).

optical_duplicate_pixel_distance.title: MarkDuplicates - Optical Duplicate Pixel Distance
optical_duplicate_pixel_distance.description: The `--OPTICAL_DUPLICATE_PIXEL_DISTANCE` parameter is used by MarkDuplicates to set the maximum offset between two duplicate clusters in pixels for them to be considered optical duplicates. A value of 100 is generally appropriate for unpatterned Illumina flowcells and 250 is appropriate for patterned Illumina flow cells.

save_output_as_bam.title: Save Output as BAM
save_output_as_bam.description: Save mapped reads as BAM files instead of the default CRAM format.

save_mapped.title: Save Mapped Reads
save_mapped.description: Save the mapped BAM/CRAM files (before duplicate marking) to the results directory.

split_fastq.title: Split FastQ size
split_fastq.description: Number of reads per split of each FastQ file; splitting parallelizes mapping across shards to speed it up. Set 0 to disable splitting.

extra_params_json.title: Extra Parameters (JSON)
extra_params_json.description: Optional: provide additional workflow parameters as a JSON object (e.g. {"skip_markduplicates": true}). Parameters are validated against the nf-core/sarek schema for the selected workflow version — unrecognized keys are silently removed.
